samples.name: agency_rewrite_specific
samples.description: Hero rewrite for an agency-tier business should produce specific, anti-slop variants with place-anchored claims.
samples.stubbed_output: {"hero_headline_variants":[{"text":"Single-origin beans roasted Tuesday in the 11th.","rationale":"Place + freshness anchor"}],"hero_subhead_variants":[{"text":"Open 7-19, locals\u2019 secret on rue Saint-Maur.","rationale":"Time + neighborhood"}],"primary_cta_variants":[{"text":"See today\u2019s pour","style":"action_imperative"}],"value_prop_bullets":[{"text":"Beans roasted within the week"}]}
